home.heroTitle: Bread, cheese, and a country you should know.
home.heroSubtitle: Two thousand years of recipes, hand-pressed and hand-baked in Dublin, Ohio.
home.featuredSubtitle: Hand-pressed cheese and hot khachapuri, fresh every day
home.heritageTitle: A country at the edge of the known world.
home.heritageText: Two thousand years ago, Colchis was the kingdom Greek sailors called the edge of the known world. We make those foods, here, with Ohio milk and our grandmothers' recipes.

heritage.title: Our Heritage
heritage.subtitle: Ancient Heritage, Fresh Every Day
heritage.intro: In the ancient land of Colchis, where the Golden Fleece was sought, a tradition of cheesemaking has flourished for millennia. We bring that tradition to Ohio.
heritage.traditionText: Georgia is one of the oldest cheesemaking regions in the world. For over 6,000 years, Georgian cheesemakers have perfected the art of crafting unique cheeses that are unlike anything found elsewhere.
heritage.ohioText: We source the finest local milk from Ohio's premium dairy farms, combining ancient Georgian techniques with modern food safety standards to create cheese that honors tradition while meeting the highest quality benchmarks.
heritage.processText: Every batch of Colchis Food cheese is handcrafted in small quantities, ensuring meticulous attention to detail. From stretching and brining to aging — each step follows time-honored methods.

shop.title: Our A2 Dairy Collection
shop.subtitle: Authentic Georgian dairy, crafted exclusively from 100% Grass-Fed A2 Brown Swiss Milk
shop.masterbrandPromise: Crafted exclusively from 100% Grass-Fed A2 Brown Swiss Milk. Easy to digest, rich in protein, rooted in ancient Georgian dairy traditions. Heritage recipes, made fresh in Ohio.

checkout.title: Checkout
checkout.comingSoonText: We are currently setting up our payment processing. Please check back soon or contact us directly to place an order.

recipes.title: Recipes & Pairings
recipes.subtitle: Discover delicious ways to enjoy our artisanal Georgian cheese

journal.title: Journal
journal.subtitle: Stories, heritage, and insights from the heart of Georgian cheesemaking.
journal.empty: No articles published yet. Check back soon!

wholesale.title: Wholesale Partnership
wholesale.subtitle: Bring authentic Georgian cheese to your customers
wholesale.heroText: Stock the only Georgian cheese made in the Midwest. Cold-chain delivery within a 10-hour drive radius.
wholesale.benefit1Text: Handcrafted artisanal cheese made with the finest Ohio dairy
wholesale.benefit2Text: Consistent production from our Ohio facility with flexible delivery schedules
wholesale.benefit3Text: Volume-based pricing with dedicated B2B support
wholesale.successText: Thank you for your interest. Our sales team will contact you within 2 business days.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: We'd love to hear from you

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to common questions about our products and services

footer.description: Georgian cheese & bread, hand-pressed and hand-baked in Dublin, Ohio.

dashboard.title: Partner Dashboard
dashboard.noActiveContractDesc: Your account is pending review or contract signature. You cannot place orders yet.
dashboard.noOrdersYet: You haven't placed any bulk orders yet.
dashboard.noRepAssigned: A dedicated account rep will be assigned to your company shortly. In the meantime, reply to any order-confirmation email and our wholesale team will help.

order.title: Place Bulk Order
order.subtitle: Review inventory and place your order. Your {discount}% contract discount is automatically applied.

orderSuccess.noReferenceBody: We couldn't find an order_id in the URL.
orderSuccess.notFoundBody: We couldn't find this order under your account.
orderSuccess.paidBody: Stock has been deducted. Your dispatch will appear in Recent Shipments shortly.
orderSuccess.processingBody: ACH transfers settle in 1-3 business days. You'll see this order flip to Confirmed once Stripe finalizes the payment.
orderSuccess.failedBody: Stripe was unable to charge the payment method. Please try a different card or contact sales.

orderDetail.noInvoice: No net-terms invoice for this order.

invoices.title: Invoices & billing
invoices.subtitle: Your net-terms invoices, balances, and payment links.
invoices.noPartnerNotice: Place your first Resolve net-terms order to initialize your partner profile and start receiving invoices.
invoices.overdueWarning: You have {amount} past due. Please pay open invoices to avoid holds on new orders.
invoices.noInvoices: No invoices yet. Net-terms orders you place will appear here.

schedules.title: Recurring orders
schedules.subtitle: Set a cadence and we'll auto-place the order. Pause, edit, or delete any time.
schedules.noPartnerProfile: Place your first Resolve net-terms order to initialize your partner profile, then come back to set up recurring schedules.

team.title: Team
team.intro: Invite teammates to order on your account. Assign someone to a shop to limit them to that location, or leave them unassigned to order for any shop. Choose whether each person can see billing.

locations.title: My shops
locations.intro: Add the locations you order for. Pick a shop when placing an order or setting up a recurring schedule — its address fills the ship-to automatically. Mark a shop as a separate billing entity if you invoice it on its own.

documents.title: Documents
documents.subtitle: Your contracts, tax documents, and billing in one place.
documents.noResaleCertPrefix: No resale certificate on file. Add one on your
documents.noResaleCertSuffix: page to keep wholesale orders tax-exempt.

account.title: Account & company
account.notInitialized: Your partner profile isn't initialized yet. Place your first Resolve net-terms order and your account details will appear here.
account.subtitle: Manage your company profile, resale certificate, credit, and payment methods.

bulkOrder.stripeNote: Payment is processed by Stripe. Stock is reserved on submit and released if payment fails.
